headline: COMMUNITY LEGEND
title: The world's largest prompt library, now an app.
subtitle: Prompts.chat evolved from 157K-star Awesome ChatGPT Prompts into a full interactive web experience. Search, browse, and instantly use hundreds of community-crafted prompts — your AI copilot deserves better commands.

headline: EDITOR'S PICK
title: Share secrets that vanish without a trace.
subtitle: SecretDrop wraps AES-256 encryption in dead-simple one-time links — share passwords and API keys that self-destruct after a single view. Zero sign-up, zero storage, zero worry.

headline: MUST TRY
title: See every open port on your Mac, instantly.
subtitle: Portier lives in your menu bar and maps every active network port to the exact process behind it — organized by Development, System, and more. Security clarity you didn't know you needed.

headline: FAN FAVORITE
title: Every price tag hides a cost in hours.
subtitle: paus converts any purchase price into real work hours, making impulse buys feel exactly as heavy as they are. Set pause reminders, track your wins, and finally shop with intention.
